productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Graphic Play Purple Handbag
description: Stylish to the T, this handbag with energetic, multi-coloured print and bright straps makes for a perfect wear for the woman of style. Easy to use, copiously spacious and comfortable to carry, this is a must-add in any woman's wardrobe.  Height: 13" Width: 18" Depth: 4.5" Capacity: 25 litres Made of polyester with a nylon lining for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders Wide synthetic woven fabric handles for easy carrying One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a zippered pocket One small zippered pouch hanging from a loop outside to hold a mobile or small change Care Hand washClean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not dry clean or machine washDo not bleach Do not tumble dryDo not wringLine dry Do not iron
